rear:open start pwm=500 samples=250 period=20ms
rear:dump begin mode=open samples=250 period=20ms warmup=50 target=18
rear:columns index,m3_raw,m1_raw,raw_diff
ctrl:columns index,m3_filtered,m3_pwm,m1_filtered,m1_pwm
edge:columns index,m3_positive,m3_negative,m1_positive,m1_negative
